# CLI-Anything

> CLI-Anything is an open-source collection of 130+ agent-ready CLI wrappers that turn popular desktop applications, cloud APIs, and SaaS platforms into command-line tools. Every CLI supports --json output, a detect command, and pip install. Built for AI agents (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor, Codex).

## Core Documentation
- [Quick Start](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/docs.html): Install any CLI tool via pip, configure credentials, run commands with --json output
- [Full Tool Registry](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/cli/index.html): Browse 130+ CLI tools by category with search and filters
- [About CLI-Anything](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/about.html): Mission, architecture, and open source philosophy
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/chatjesus/CLI-Anything-Hub): Source code, monorepo structure, contribution guide

## Image & Design Tools
- [GIMP CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/gimp/): Batch image processing, filters, watermarks, format conversion — pip install cli-anything-gimp
- [Blender CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/blender/): 3D scene management, headless rendering via bpy — pip install cli-anything-blender
- [Inkscape CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/inkscape/): SVG creation, vector editing, multi-format export — pip install cli-anything-inkscape

## Video & Audio Tools
- [OBS Studio CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/obs-studio/): Live streaming and recording control via obs-websocket — pip install cli-anything-obs-studio
- [Audacity CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/audacity/): Audio editing, noise reduction, format conversion — pip install cli-anything-audacity
- [Shotcut CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/shotcut/): Video editing via MLT XML — pip install cli-anything-shotcut
- [Kdenlive CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/kdenlive/): Video editing via MLT XML — pip install cli-anything-kdenlive

## Office & Productivity Tools
- [Microsoft 365 CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/ms365/): Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook COM automation — pip install cli-anything-ms365
- [LibreOffice CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/libreoffice/): Writer, Calc, Impress headless document conversion — pip install cli-anything-libreoffice
- [Notion CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/notion/): Pages, databases, blocks via Notion REST API — pip install cli-anything-notion
- [Google Workspace CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/gworkspace/): Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs — pip install cli-anything-gworkspace
- [Feishu CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/feishu/): Messages, docs, calendar via Feishu Open API — pip install cli-anything-feishu

## Communication Tools
- [Slack CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/slack/): Messages, channels, files via Slack Web API — pip install cli-anything-slack
- [Discord CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/discord/): Guilds, channels, webhooks via Discord REST API v10 — pip install cli-anything-discord
- [Telegram CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/telegram/): Bot messages, groups, polls via Telegram Bot API — pip install cli-anything-telegram
- [Zoom CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/zoom/): Meeting management via Zoom REST API — pip install cli-anything-zoom

## Development Tools
- [Docker CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/docker/): Container lifecycle, images, volumes via Docker SDK — pip install cli-anything-docker
- [GitHub CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/github/): Issues, PRs, Actions, releases via GitHub REST API — pip install cli-anything-github

## AI & Automation Tools
- [Ollama CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/ollama/): Local LLM management, chat, embeddings via Ollama REST API — pip install cli-anything-ollama

## SaaS & Business Tools
- [Stripe CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/stripe/): Payments, subscriptions, refunds via Stripe SDK — pip install cli-anything-stripe
- [Shopify CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/shopify/): Products, orders, inventory via Shopify Admin API — pip install cli-anything-shopify
- [Salesforce CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/salesforce/): SOQL queries, leads, opportunities via Salesforce REST API — pip install cli-anything-salesforce
- [HubSpot CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/hubspot/): Contacts, deals, workflows via HubSpot CRM API — pip install cli-anything-hubspot
- [Jira CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/jira/): Issues, sprints, JQL queries via Atlassian REST API — pip install cli-anything-jira

## Cloud & Infrastructure Tools
- [Vercel CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/vercel/): Deployments, domains, environment variables via Vercel API — pip install cli-anything-vercel
- [Cloudflare CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/cloudflare/): DNS, Workers, R2, D1 via Cloudflare REST API — pip install cli-anything-cloudflare
- [Twilio CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/twilio/): SMS, voice calls, WhatsApp via Twilio SDK — pip install cli-anything-twilio

## Diagrams & Utilities
- [Draw.io CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/drawio/): Flowcharts and architecture diagrams via mxGraph XML — pip install cli-anything-drawio
- [AnyGen CLI](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/anygen/): Universal content generation API — pip install cli-anything-anygen

## Installation
- [PyPI Search](https://pypi.org/search/?q=cli-anything): All packages follow the naming pattern cli-anything-{software}
- Install any tool: `pip install cli-anything-{software}`
- Every tool supports: `detect` (check availability), `version` (show version), `--json` (structured output)

## Optional
- [Architecture Overview](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/docs.html): How CLI-Anything works — manifest spec, MCP bridge, agent integration
- [Showcase](https://www.agentputer.com/cli-anything/showcase.html): Featured use cases and demo workflows
- [Submit a CLI](https://github.com/chatjesus/CLI-Anything-Hub/issues/new?labels=cli-submission): Contribute a new CLI wrapper to the Hub
